findings.description: The hint "遅延送信" does not appear in the source file text. The source only mentions "応答不要メッセージ送信処理" and "同期応答メッセージ送信処理". This term was inferred from the filename "delayed_send.rst" but has no textual basis in the source content.
findings.source_evidence: Source text: 「取引単体テストの実施方法は、同期応答メッセージ送信処理と同じである。」— the term 遅延送信 is absent.
